name: Dub.co
description: Monitor Dub.co link management for domain security and access control compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Dub.co at https://app.dub.co
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Dub.co Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Dub.co workspaces and members for link management access control
